paper_focus.title: High Manganese and Aluminum Steels for the Military and Transportation Industry
paper_focus.research_objective: To review and elucidate the effects of Si alloying and P impurity on the age-hardening behavior, tensile properties, and dynamic fracture toughness of high-Mn-Al lightweight austenitic steels.
material_systems: SAE 4130 quenched and tempered Cr-Mo reference steel

visual_evidence.description: Figure 1 presents optical micrographs comparing the as-cast and wrought microstructures of high-manganese aluminum steels. Subfigure (a) is a bright-field optical micrograph of an as-cast Fe-28Mn-3Al-0.9Si-1.2C-0.6Mo...
